raw_text: Duplicate Advisory: Exec allowlist wrapper analysis did not unwrap env/shell dispatch chains ## Duplicate Advisory This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-jj82-76v6-933r. This link is maintained to preserve external references. ## Original Description OpenClaw versions prior to 2026.2.22 contain an allowlist bypass vulnerability in system.run exec analysis that fails to unwrap env and shell-dispatch wrapper chains. Attackers can route execution through wrapper binaries like env bash to smuggle payloads that satisfy allowlist entries while executing non-allowlisted commands.
